seo.title: Dallas Electrics Contractor Pros | Expert Electricians in Dallas, TX
seo.description: Professional electrical services in Dallas, TX. Residential and commercial electricians. Licensed, insured, and trusted. Call (214) 206-8435 for fast service.

hero.headline: Expert Electrical Solutions for Your Home & Business
hero.subheadline: From simple repairs to full rewiring, our licensed electricians deliver safe, code-compliant work with unmatched reliability.

featureSections.title: Safe, Modern Electrical for Your Home
featureSections.body: We handle everything from outlet repairs to full panel upgrades, ensuring your home is safe and efficient. Our electricians are trained to the highest standards.
featureSections.cardBody: Upgrade your electrical panel to handle modern appliances and avoid breaker trips. Our team installs top brands with precision.

featureSections.title: Powering Dallas Businesses
featureSections.body: Minimize downtime with our fast, professional commercial electrical services. We work around your schedule to keep your business running smoothly.
featureSections.cardBody: Reduce energy costs with LED retrofits. We design and install efficient lighting for offices, warehouses, and retail spaces.

cta.headline: Ready to Get Started?
cta.subheadline: Call us today or schedule online for a free estimate.

servicesPage.intro: From minor repairs to major installations, our Dallas electricians provide comprehensive services for residential and commercial clients. We combine technical expertise with exceptional customer care.

services.title: Electrical Repairs & Troubleshooting
services.shortDescription: Fast, reliable diagnosis and repair for any electrical issue.
services.longDescription: Whether it's a flickering light, dead outlet, or tripping breaker, our electricians quickly identify the root cause and provide lasting repairs. We handle all makes and models, ensuring your system is safe and functional.

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: We inspect the issue and test circuits to pinpoint the problem.

process.title: Repair
process.description: Using quality parts, we fix the issue safely and efficiently.

process.title: Testing
process.description: We test the repair and ensure everything operates correctly.

faqs.question: How soon can you respond to an emergency?
faqs.answer: We offer 24/7 emergency service and typically arrive within 1 hour for urgent calls.

faqs.question: Do you charge for estimates?
faqs.answer: We provide free estimates for most repair work. Contact us to schedule.

services.title: Electrical Panel Upgrades
services.shortDescription: Modernize your panel for safety and capacity.
services.longDescription: Older panels can't handle today's electrical demands. We upgrade to 200-amp or higher panels, improving safety and preventing overloads. Our team handles permits and inspections.
benefits: Reduces fire risk from outdated panels

process.title: Assessment
process.description: We evaluate your current panel and load requirements.

process.title: Installation
process.description: We install a new panel with proper grounding and breakers.

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We coordinate with the city for final approval.

faqs.question: How long does a panel upgrade take?
faqs.answer: Most upgrades are completed in 4-8 hours, depending on complexity.

faqs.question: Will I need to be home during the upgrade?
faqs.answer: Yes, we need access to the panel area. We'll coordinate a convenient time.

services.title: Lighting Installation & Design
services.shortDescription: Beautiful, energy-efficient lighting for any space.
services.longDescription: From indoor ambiance to outdoor security lighting, we design and install custom lighting solutions. We use LED technology to save energy and enhance aesthetics. Our designs complement your architecture.
benefits: Energy savings up to 80% with LED
Custom designs tailored to your style

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We discuss your vision and assess the space.

process.title: Design
process.description: We create a lighting plan with fixture selection.

process.title: Installation
process.description: We install fixtures, wiring, and controls neatly.

faqs.question: Do you offer smart lighting options?
faqs.answer: Yes, we install smart switches, dimmers, and systems like Lutron and Philips Hue.

faqs.question: Can you install landscape lighting?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We specialize in low-voltage landscape lighting for pathways, gardens, and patios.

services.title: Commercial Electrical Services
services.shortDescription: Keep your business powered and compliant.
services.longDescription: We provide comprehensive electrical solutions for Dallas businesses, including offices, retail, restaurants, and warehouses. Our services include new construction wiring, data cabling, and emergency repairs. We minimize downtime.
benefits: Single point of contact for projects

process.title: Site Survey
process.description: We assess your electrical needs and infrastructure.

process.title: Proposal
process.description: We provide a detailed quote and timeline.

process.title: Execution
process.description: Our team completes the work efficiently with regular updates.

faqs.question: Do you handle permits for commercial work?
faqs.answer: Yes, we obtain all necessary permits and schedule inspections.

faqs.question: Can you work during off-hours?
faqs.answer: We offer evening and weekend service to avoid business interruptions.

about.headline: Dallas's Trusted Electrical Experts
about.mission: To deliver safe, reliable electrical services with integrity and professionalism, ensuring every customer feels confident in their electrical systems.
story: Dallas Electrics Contractor Pros was founded by a team of master electricians who saw a need for honest, high-quality electrical work in the Dallas area. With over 15 years of combined experience, we built a company focused on customer education, transparent pricing, and exceptional craftsmanship.

Today, we serve hundreds of homeowners and businesses across Dallas, from historic homes in Lakewood to modern offices in Uptown. Our reputation is built on trust—we show up on time, communicate clearly, and never cut corners. Every job, big or small, receives the same dedication.

coreValues.title: Safety First
coreValues.description: We never compromise on safety. Every installation meets or exceeds code.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: Honest advice, fair pricing, and transparent communication.

coreValues.title: Excellence
coreValues.description: Continuous training and top-quality materials ensure superior results.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We're proud to support Dallas neighborhoods and local businesses.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with Dallas Electrics Contractor Pros
contact.subheadline: Ready to start your project? Call or fill out our form for a free estimate.
